items.name_en: New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
items.name_cn:
New WHY TOTE Shoulder Shopping Bag 🔥
Fine-grain leather tote, fully lined in matching suede, adorned with exquisite Y letter logo inspired by the brand's historical collection. The shopping bag is lightweight and spacious, featuring an internal zippered pocket and a hook closure! A touch of Parisian sophistication with a relaxed vibe, don't miss this if you love large capacity bags!
Style No.: 817602
Size: 37X32X7CM

The most popular tote of the year is definitely this one.

items.name_en: New YSL Classic Tote, a fashion mainstay🌟|||🔥This YSL classic tote is simply the king of fashion! It makes you instantly look like a fashionista!😍
items.name_cn:
New YSL Classic Tote, a fashion mainstay🌟|||🔥This YSL classic tote is simply the king of fashion! It makes you instantly look like a fashionista!😍
1️⃣First, the design is truly classic! Stylish yet timeless, which is rare. 👜
2️⃣The material is excellent, comfortable to the touch, and feels very high-quality. 👝
3️⃣The space is large enough to hold many daily essentials, such as a phone, wallet, keys, etc. 📱🏺
4️⃣The strap length is suitable; it can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, very convenient.
5️⃣There are many color choices, suitable for various styles and occasions. The starry grey I got is super versatile! ✨
🔥Overall, this YSL classic tote is a very worthy fashion item! Whether matching outfits or as a daily bag, it is very suitable. 👗👚👠. Dimensions 25x15x8, Style No. 80993
